name: Pandi Durai S
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software Engineer with nearly 2 years of experience building full-stack web applications, deploying deep learning models, and developing MLOps workflows. Delivered AI solutions improving model accuracy by 12–15%, optimized CI/CD pipelines with Docker/Jenkins, and built scalable applications using React, Next.js, Python, MySQL, and microservices. Strong in computer vision, model development, and end-to-end project execution.

experience.description: Developing AI-driven systems, scalable applications, and DevOps pipelines.
achievements: Developing an AI/DL gaze-tracking system on Raspberry Pi, improving prediction accuracy by 15%.
Building and deploying full-stack applications using React/Next.js, Python, MySQL, REST APIs and Microservices.
Improved Moodle/WordPress LMS performance and workflow efficiency by 20%.
Enhanced CI/CD pipelines using Docker, Jenkins, SonarQube, and Git-based version control.

experience.description: Developed machine learning models, backend APIs, and automation workflows.
achievements: Developed, trained, deployed and tested deep learning models using TensorFlow and PyTorch.
Built backend APIs and dashboards using Python, JavaScript, MySQL and REST API integrations.
Designed automation scripts and contributed to production deployment pipelines.
Collaborated on CI/CD processes and workflow validation.

experience.description: Worked on Linux-based automation and system-level performance optimization.
achievements: Created Bash scripts to automate system tasks and improved server performance.
Performed Linux-based system flashing, testing, and data validation workflows.
